headline: ADVANCED EV SOLUTIONS wins Best EV Maintenance and Repair Specialist
standfirst: ADVANCED EV SOLUTIONS is recognised in the Global Business Excellence Awards previous winners archive for Best EV Maintenance and Repair Specialist, with source-backed context prepared for readers reviewing the award record.

content.text: ADVANCED EV SOLUTIONS and the award record

ADVANCED EV SOLUTIONS is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best EV Maintenance and Repair Specialist. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for ADVANCED EV SOLUTIONS, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

Official and social sources support Advanced EV Solutions as an EV service and repair business associated with Advanced Car Diagnostics. The GBE archive and social post support the award claim. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
Why the Best EV Maintenance and Repair Specialist record matters

The Best EV Maintenance and Repair Specialist recognition places ADVANCED EV SOLUTIONS in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025. For a prospective customer, partner, journalist, or award researcher, the practical value of this page is a clean public record: who received the award, what the award was called, and which source trail was reviewed before publication.
Award title: Best EV Maintenance and Repair Specialist.
Recipient profile reviewed against available source notes.

Source notes reviewed for this page include gbeaward.com, advevtech.com, facebook.com, facebook.com. These references are used to confirm identity, business activity, programme identity, or award context. Where a source is a social profile, directory listing, booking platform, or press article rather than a recipient-owned website, the article keeps the claim narrow and avoids treating that source as proof of wider performance.
For the Best EV Maintenance and Repair Specialist page, that source trail anchors the story to the exact award record instead of a broad promotional profile.

Imported image is unrelated; confirm relationship between Advanced EV Solutions and Advanced Car Diagnostics. This limitation matters because the site should not turn a winner listing into inflated SEO copy. It should help people discover the award record while keeping every visible claim defensible.
The Best EV Maintenance and Repair Specialist page therefore stays careful, useful, and defensible for readers checking the public record.

ADVANCED EV SOLUTIONS's winner page will continue to be updated when stronger official sources, rights-cleared media, recipient statements, or ceremony materials are available. Until then, this page prioritises clarity, the official award wording, and source-backed context over generic promotional language.
Future updates to the Best EV Maintenance and Repair Specialist page can add deeper recipient context when stronger evidence is available.
